reasoning: To exceed a 20% BEV market share for Q2 2025, the average share across April, May, and June must be greater than 20%. According to ACEA press release sidebar snippets, the year-to-date (YTD) BEV market share reached only 15.3% through April 2025 and 15.4% through May 2025. Given that Q1 2025 was 15.2%, this implies the isolated BEV market share was approximately 15.6% in April and 15.8% in May. For the Q2 average to surpass 20%, June's market share would need to exceed 28%. Absent a massive, unprecedented policy shock or sudden surge, this is functionally impossible, particularly given broader industry headwinds and a continuous decline in Tesla sales. The crowd forecast was already very low (10%) in late May, and the latest May data confirming slow mid-15% growth further cements this trajectory. Consequently, I assess the probability at the minimum allowed.
